query:
SELECT 
  s.id,
  s.service_name,
  s.service_ref,
  s.monthly_cost,
  s.monthly_revenue,
  s.supplier_name,
  s.customer_name,
  bia.billing_item_id,
  bi.description AS billing_item_description,
  bi.line_amount AS billing_item_amount,
  bi.unit_amount AS billing_item_unit_amount,
  bi.quantity AS billing_item_qty,
  bi.account_code
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN billing_item_assignments bia ON bia.service_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.id = bia.billing_item_id
WHERE s.supplier_name LIKE '%Channel%' OR s.supplier_name LIKE '%ECN%'
ORDER BY (s.monthly_revenue - s.monthly_cost) ASC
LIMIT 20;
